overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk game showing a walk through a dusty desert city outskirts. The player moves from a highway roadside past billboards and a gas station, through commercial streets with neon signs, and across intersections with scattered pedestrians, with a hazy futuristic city skyline visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert roadside next to a metal guardrail with billboards visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal barrier running parallel to the road with red and white stripes
large billboard featuring a cyan-colored animated character
low industrial structure with flat roof
tall modern street lamps lining the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a dusty desert highway roadside. A metal guardrail runs parallel to the empty multi-lane road, with large commercial billboards visible in the hazy distance. Sparse dry vegetation and industrial structures dot the landscape under a hazy afternoon sky.

events.description: crossing from dirt roadside onto the paved asphalt road toward the gas station
turning slightly to view the gas station canopy and surrounding palm trees

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road and approaching the gas station area on the opposite side

entered.detail: green and yellow gas station roof with supporting columns
tall palm trees near the gas station
billboard advertising food with burger image
illuminated sign reading CHOOH2 on a tall pole

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the asphalt road toward a gas station with a distinctive green and yellow canopy. Palm trees and various billboards line the approach, while a neon CHOOH2 sign becomes visible on the right. The environment transitions from open desert roadside to a more developed commercial intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signs and storefronts

events.description: first pedestrians appear standing at the crosswalk ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past commercial signs and approaching pedestrians at an intersection

man in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: vertical neon sign displaying FUEL in blue letters
large white billboard with colorful advertisement
pink neon sign for PieZ restaurant
colorful vending machines near the fuel sign

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with neon signs including a blue FUEL sign and colorful vending machines. The camera approaches an intersection where a woman in a red skirt and a man stand waiting at the crosswalk. A pink neon PieZ sign is visible in the distance as the scene becomes more populated.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and mixed residential buildings

events.description: crossing the street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians
passing under a large billboard structure and entering a more open road area with city skyline visible

agents.ego_description: crossing multiple street intersections and navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: man in green shirt and shorts crossing the street
group of pedestrians walking on the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story green wooden house with red roof
massive billboard structure with DELAMAIN text and logo
overhead electrical wires spanning across the road
green, purple, and blue trash bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses through urban intersections alongside other pedestrians, passing a green two-story house and colorful trash bins. A massive DELAMAIN billboard dominates the left side as the view opens up to reveal overhead power lines and a hazy futuristic city skyline in the distance. The crowd density increases to moderate with people crossing in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with distant city skyline and industrial elements

agents.ego_description: walking along the open road with the hazy city skyline ahead, following a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in gray shirt and shorts walking ahead on the road

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers visible through the haze in the distance
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open urban arterial road with overhead power lines and utility poles lining the right side. The massive DELAMAIN billboard recedes into the distance on the left as the hazy skyline of futuristic towers dominates the horizon ahead. A pedestrian walks ahead on the road, and the environment feels more industrial and open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate desert roadside into the dense, neon-lit outskirts of a futuristic city. It begins by walking along a dusty highway beside a metal guardrail and sparse vegetation, moving past distant billboards under a hazy afternoon sky. As the camera crosses the asphalt, the open landscape transitions into a commercial hub, passing a green and yellow gas station canopy and a glowing CHOOH2 sign. The scene then shifts onto a crowded sidewalk lined with colorful vending machines and neon signs, weaving through pedestrians at an intersection before passing a green two-story house and a massive Delamain billboard. Finally, the view opens up along an industrial arterial road where overhead power lines frame the horizon, leading the camera toward a towering, hazy city skyline.
